name: Rochester Country Club Restaurant
about: Rochester Country Club is a traditional private golf and social club located in Rochester, New Hampshire. The venue features an 18-hole golf course, a pro shop, dining facilities, and a dedicated indoor golf simulator area. The club offers various membership options, tournament play, leagues, and event hosting capabilities. The simulator technology is highlighted as a year-round golf option, available for booking up to 14 days in advance, and includes a competitive simulator league for members.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round indoor golf simulator access for consistent practice and play
Comprehensive simulator league with scores and information for competitive play
Private country club setting with well-maintained course and facilities
Dedicated instructors and lesson programs for all skill levels
Flexible booking system allowing tee times up to 14 days in advance

food_and_drink.notes: On-site restaurant (RCC Grille) with full kitchen service available
Strict no outside alcohol policy enforced

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify equipment rental options, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs when using the simulators or playing the course.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the club has a strict 'no outside alcohol' policy, and the website does not mention outside food, suggesting their on-site restaurant (RCC Grille) is the dining option.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific time estimates for simulator rounds, as typical 18-hole simulator sessions vary based on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Rochester Country Club offers junior/youth programs and lessons, and hosts family-oriented events like Paint Night, indicating it is suitable for families with children.
